name: t/d small bites chicken flavor dry dog food
description: hill's prescription diet t/d small bitesdry dog food is clinically shown to reduce plaque, stain & tartar buildup and clean up to the gum line in small dogs. it works like a toothbrush, dental floss and mouthwash all in one and is formulated as a complete and balanced nutritional solution for your dog's daily health regimen. 임상적으로 입증된 삼중 작용 섬유소층 기술 잇몸 청결에 도움을 주는 독특한 사료 크기, 모양, 질감 임상적으로 입증된 항산화제, 균형 잡힌 영양 공급
